necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 must finish the archive-verification renderer families before N5 can safely merge thin renderer files back into services and lower file-count ratchets.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: The disabled runtime shell design draft family is a later Phase-B merge candidate once renderer files only declare builder specs plus a small archive-reference helper.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 builder already supports entries, messages, and raw lines. The existing renderArchiveFileReferences helper remains local because it preserves a family-specific archive-reference line format without adding builder surface area.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at the seven disabled runtime shell design draft archive verification renderers; minimal integration and sandbox handle archive verification families remain separate batches.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 7 disabled runtime shell design draft archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real fallback profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2092-renderer-consolidation-batch-4-v2121.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2121 only changes Node markdown rendering implementation for frozen local profiles; it does not require fresh sibling evidence, live integration, or upstream service startup.
